title: Sweet Silky Jamaican Chinese Long Bean Curry
description: A sweet and indulgent Jamaican dish featuring Chinese long beans in a rich and creamy curry sauce, made paleo-friendly with coconut milk and spices. This dish is perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the curry powder, turmeric, and cumin and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Chinese long beans and cook until they start to soften, about 5 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook, covered, until the beans are tender, about 15-20 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
